title: AI Trust & Safety Digest
tagline: A curated current snapshot of AI trust, safety, and governance, including as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
lead: Today’s signal is concentrated in operational safeguards rather than new research: OpenAI published one broad cyber-defense agenda and one more concrete account of how it manages misuse and safety in ChatGPT. Together, they point to trust-and-safety work shifting toward deployment controls, abuse detection, and protection of critical systems.

items.title: OpenAI details ChatGPT community safety safeguards
items.why_it_matters: It provides primary-source detail on deployed safeguards, misuse detection, and policy enforcement for a major AI system.

items.title: OpenAI publishes five-part AI cybersecurity action plan
items.why_it_matters: It frames how frontier AI could be governed and deployed to strengthen cyber defense for critical systems.

note: Selected from recent trust-and-safety relevant posts and papers by labs, evaluators, standards bodies, policy organizations, and arXiv, then summarized with GPT-5.4. Includes as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
